char_overview: A half-underground firearms workshop. Cynical ex-狩灵协会3科 armorer who found more money outside the system.
char_looks: Black hair slicked back. Weathered face, dark brown eyes, sardonic jaw. Faded tattoos of ballistic charts on both forearms. Oil-stained henley shirt with rolled sleeves, faded black jeans, worn work boots. Loupe pushed up on forehead. None.
char_flaws: Knows what his guns are used for and sleeps fine. Charges extra for silence, never refuses a paying client. Dismissive of anyone who cannot discuss ballistics.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-着弹: Infuses completed firearms with a signature 灵力 imprint that records every shot fired. Allows remote tracking of his weapons' usage. Imprint is permanent and cannot be removed without destroying the firearm.
char_mission: Take commissions that pay well and interest him technically. Stay outside 狩灵协会3科's radar, visible enough to keep getting clients.

char_relationships.烬: Client, built 轻语 to 烬's exact specifications over three months of clandestine meetings, never asked what the gun was for. The only name ever scratched out in his ledger is his.
char_relationships.狩灵协会3科: Former employer, left after realizing the money outside the system was better. Still uses 狩灵协会3科-grade tooling in his workshop.
